scripts.test: node tests/content-integrity.test.cjs && node tests/calculators/new-calcs.test.cjs && node tests/calculators/buildings.test.cjs && node tests/content-validation.test.cjs && node tests/integration/api.test.cjs && node tests/e2e/flow.test.cjs
scripts.test:all: node tests/content-integrity.test.cjs && node tests/integration/api.test.cjs && node tests/e2e/flow.test.cjs
scripts.lint: node -e "const f=require('fs'); ['js/calculators','js/export','api'].forEach(d=>{ if(f.existsSync(d)) console.log('✅',d,'exists'); else { console.error('❌',d,'missing'); process.exit(1); } });"
